stemHtml: Comparing two aircraft, one with rectangular wings and one with swept wings, both with similar leading edge sharpness. If both aircraft exceed MCRIT by the same margin, what happens to the critical angle of attack?

options.a: The swept wing will experience a greater reduction in the critical angle of attack compared to the rectangular wing.
options.b: The rectangular wing will experience a greater reduction in the critical angle of attack compared to the swept wing.
options.c: There is no change in critical angle of attack when operating above MCRIT.
options.d: Both wings will experience the same reduction in the critical angle of attack.
